name: 天庭仙境×凡間豪門（雙世界設定）
name_en: Celestial Court × Mortal Wealthy Family (Dual World Setting)
description: 天庭場景提供喜劇和奇幻元素（打麻將、被偷襲下凡），凡間豪門提供現實衝突和爽點，兩個世界的切換讓劇情既有仙俠的趣味又有都市的爽感。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: That damn king of hell. He actually ambushed me... Lord Yan, I was secretly protecting the ninth heaven goddess in the mortal realm... Oh no. That shevil is having a baby. What do we do?
examples.context: 天庭場景提供喜劇和奇幻元素（打麻將、被偷襲下凡），凡間豪門提供現實衝突和爽點，兩個世界的切換讓劇情既有仙俠的趣味又有都市的爽感。
